creator: fax@nohik.ee
text:
Created attachment 173583
graphics/jpgraph2 update patch to 4.0.1

jpgraph2 update to 4.0.1

Changes in Makefile
* clarify license
* MASTER_SITE change

Some words about this port:
MASTER_SITE has been changed to fossies.org because I have contacted with jpgraph.net and ask if they can provide to me direct download link instead of some php script url, but they wont.
I have leaved in broken in powerpc64 as I don't have possibility to test if its build correctly.
